title: banisteria stellaris f. pubifolia
intro: Banisteria stellaris f. pubifolia, also known as the 'false kapok', is a plant species that belongs to the Malpighiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Banisteria stellaris f. pubifolia include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are typically consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
